data.title: James Wynn Reflects on Financial Losses and Plans Asset Recovery
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, James Wynn recently shared on social media his intention to recover small assets from old wallets in the coming days, expressing a desire not to leave empty-handed.

Wynn's assets have reportedly decreased by approximately $100 million from their peak. His social media profile picture has been changed to an image depicting working at McDonald's, reminiscent of the 'food delivery' meme popular in the Chinese crypto community.

BlockBeats previously reported that Wynn posted a confession an hour earlier, acknowledging his loss of control and likening his situation to gambling. He expressed a desire to recover his losses while fearing ridicule for not being able to maintain his $100 million earnings, leading him deeper into financial troubles.

data.title: Bitcoin Donation to Silk Road Founder Linked to Alphabay Wallet
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, a crypto wallet associated with the now-defunct dark web marketplace Alphabay has been identified as the source of a $31 million Bitcoin donation to Ross Ulbricht, the creator of Silk Road. Blockchain analytics firm Chainalysis revealed that the 300 Bitcoin (BTC) donated to Ulbricht earlier this month were traced back to Alphabay, which operated from 2014 to 2017 as a predecessor to Silk Road. Chainalysis suggested that the funds likely originated from a major vendor on the platform who had access to such substantial amounts.

Phil Larratt, Chainalysis director of investigations, stated, "We have reasonable grounds to suspect that these funds originated in AlphaBay." He added that the amount suggests it came from someone who was possibly a vendor on AlphaBay during its early days. Independent blockchain investigator ZachXBT confirmed that the 300 Bitcoin did not originate from Silk Road and noted suspicious patterns in the donor's fund movements. The donor reportedly used multiple mixing services to obscure the transaction trail and cashed out other cryptocurrencies in small amounts to avoid detection, indicating potential criminal origins.

ZachXBT commented on X that the donation appears to have come from a "sketchy centralized mixing service" called Jambler, contrasting with normal privacy enthusiasts who use decentralized mixers like Wasabi and the now-defunct Samourai. He further suggested that the donation was a "legitimate donation, but not legitimate funds," explaining that the use of multiple mixers and spreading out centralized exchange deposits are typical methods to prevent illicit funds from being frozen.

Chainalysis played a crucial role in identifying Bitcoin addresses linked to AlphaBay, contributing significantly to the takedown of the darknet marketplace during "Operation Bayonet," an investigation that spanned 2016 and 2017. Any Bitcoin held since then would have appreciated dramatically, potentially over 40-fold, yet the identity of the donor and their motivation remain unknown. In January, U.S. President Donald Trump fully pardoned Ross Ulbricht, who had been imprisoned for 12 years, serving a double life sentence plus 40 years for his role in running Silk Road.

data.title: Pakistan's Crypto Minister Discusses Blockchain Future with Wall Street Executive
data.description: According to Foresight News, Pakistan's Minister of State for Crypto and Blockchain, Bilal Bin Saqib, recently met with Brandon Lutnick, Chairman of Wall Street investment bank Cantor Fitzgerald, in New York. The discussions focused on tokenization, Bitcoin mining, the future of Web3 in Pakistan, and potential avenues for collaboration.

data.title: Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio Takes Long Position on Ethereum
data.description: According to BlockBeats, top trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio announced on his personal channel that he has taken a long position on Ethereum. He has set the stop-loss at $2,380, which corresponds to the lower shadow of the morning's low point and serves as a retest level for the mid-term timeframe range. Ng Ah Sio noted that the technical structure is clear.

data.title: Skate (SKATE) will be listed on Binance Alpha and Binance Futures on June 9, and will start airdrop activities
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Skate (SKATE) will be launched on Binance Alpha and Binance Contracts on June 9, of which Binance Alpha trading will be opened at 18:00 Beijing time on June 9, 2025, and Binance Contract trading will be opened at 18:30 (UTC) on the same day. The official also stated that eligible users need to use Binance Alpha points to claim airdrops on the event page, and the specific rules will be announced on June 9.

data.title: Crypto News: Circle (CRCL) Surges 167% on NYSE Debut, Closes at $83 After Blockbuster IPO
data.description: CRCL Soars on Wall Street Debut as Stablecoin Sentiment Heats UpCircle (CRCL) made a stunning public debut on the New York Stock Exchange on June 5, closing the day up 167% from its $31 IPO price to finish at $83 per share. The stock surged as high as $104 during intraday trading, echoing the euphoric listing seen with Coinbase in 2021.The listing comes after Circle upsized its initial public offering (IPO) to $1.05 billion, offering 34 million shares at $31 each amid soaring investor demand.Key IPO Numbers:IPO Price: $31Closing Price: $83Intraday High: $104Total Raise: $1.05 billionValuation: ~$6.9 billion (based on 220M outstanding shares)Big Backers: BlackRock and ARK Join the PartyThe bullish sentiment was bolstered by major institutions:BlackRock revealed plans to acquire 10% of the IPO.Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest expressed interest in buying $150 million worth of shares.This institutional backing likely contributed to the IPO’s oversubscription and the dramatic surge in CRCL’s trading.Stablecoin Use Surges Alongside Circle’s ListingCircle is best known as the issuer of USDC, the second-largest dollar-pegged stablecoin by market capitalization. The strong NYSE debut coincided with rising stablecoin activity:USDC trading volume jumped 22% over the last 24 hours.USDT, the top stablecoin, saw its volume rise 13%.The IPO success suggests growing investor appetite for stablecoin infrastructure, especially as traditional finance increasingly integrates with blockchain ecosystems.Industry Drama: Arca Slams Circle’s Allocation StrategyCircle’s listing wasn’t without controversy. In a now-deleted post, Arca CIO Jeff Dorman criticized the firm for providing only $135,000 in share allocation to one of its earliest supporters.“You’ve come full Circle,” Dorman wrote, referencing Arca’s long-standing support for the company.Is This Another Coinbase Moment?Despite the excitement, some market watchers are cautious. Comparisons are already being drawn to Coinbase’s 2021 IPO, which:Opened at $381Peaked at $430Dropped below $200 within weeks.

data.title: Binance Lists Skate (SKATE) on Alpha and Futures With 50x Leverage — Airdrop Available for Alpha Point Users
data.description: Binance Launches Exclusive Skate (SKATE) Trading With Alpha Airdrop and Futures ListingBinance announced the listing of Skate (SKATE) on its Binance Alpha platform and the launch of the SKATEUSDT perpetual futures contract on June 9, 2025.The SKATE spot listing will be available from 10:00 UTC, followed by futures trading at 10:30 UTC, allowing users to trade SKATEUSDT with up to 50x leverage.Binance is the first platform to list Skate, highlighting its ongoing commitment to bringing early access to innovative blockchain projects.What Is Skate (SKATE)?Skate is a cutting-edge multi-VM infrastructure designed to let any decentralized application (dApp) operate seamlessly across both EVM and non-EVM chains. At its core is a cross-chain automated market maker (AMM) that facilitates a unified liquidity curve, aiming to simplify cross-chain DeFi experiences.SKATEUSDT Perpetual Contract DetailsFeatureDetailsLaunch TimeJune 9, 2025, at 10:30 UTCLeverageUp to 50xSettlement AssetUSDTFunding Rate Cap+2.00% / -2.00%Funding Fee FrequencyEvery 4 hoursTrading Hours24/7Mode SupportedMulti-Assets Mode Claim Free SKATE via Binance Alpha AirdropTo celebrate SKATE’s launch, Binance is offering an exclusive airdrop. Eligible users can redeem Binance Alpha Points to claim SKATE tokens on the Binance Alpha Events Page between:June 9, 10:00 UTC – June 10, 10:00 UTCTo access:Open the Binance AppUse the Search bar to find “Alpha Events”Follow the steps to redeem SKATE with Alpha PointsFull instructions for claiming the Alpha airdrop are available on the Binance Alpha Events Page.

data.title: Salus founder: Chinese law enforcement agencies have cracked three money laundering cases using Hyperliquid, and the strategy structure is highly similar to James Wynn’s path
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Mirror Tang, founder of Web3 security company Salus, posted on X that since March this year, Chinese law enforcement agencies have cracked 3 cases of cryptocurrency money laundering using Hyperliquid. The criminal method mainly uses Hyperliquid's high-leverage liquidation mechanism to create liquidation losses on the platform while building reverse positions on centralized exchanges to make profits, thereby completing the flushing of illegal funds.
Mirror Tang pointed out that this strategy is highly similar to the transaction path of Hyperliquid user @JamesWynnReal.

data.title: Bitget Onchain launches CUDIS and iCoin tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) has launched Solana and BNB Smart Chain's MEME tokens CUDIS and iCoin. Users can start trading in the on-chain trading section. Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use Bitget spot accounts (USDT/USDC) to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.title: NFT Royalties: Can Creators Really Count on Passive Income Forever?
data.description:
You’ve probably heard the phrase NFT royalties thrown around like digital confetti, but what does it actually mean? Think of it like this: every time someone resells a piece of digital art, music, or collectible you created, you get a little slice of the pie—automatically. No chasing people down, no paperwork, just sweet, passive income landing in your crypto wallet. That’s the dream, right? Create something once, and get paid again and again every time it changes hands. For digital creators, this sounds like the holy grail of internet art: work less, earn more
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/06/06/nft-royalties-can-creators-really-count-on-passive-income-forever/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=nft-royalties-can-creators-really-count-on-passive-income-forever

data.title: Musk and Trump Clash Over “Big Beautiful Bill” Amid Rising Tensions
data.description:

data.title: Tether CEO: USDT market value hits $154 billion, setting a new record
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Paolo Ardoino, CEO of Tether, posted on the X platform that the market value of USDT has reached 154 billion US dollars, setting a new record high. The latest data from Coingecko shows that the current market value of stablecoins in the entire network has reached 252.72 billion US dollars, of which USDT accounts for about 60.9% and USDC accounts for 24.1%.

data.title: Tether's USDT Market Cap Reaches Record High of $154 Billion
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino announced on the X platform that the market capitalization of USDT has reached a new all-time high of $154 billion. Recent data from Coingecko indicates that the total market capitalization of stablecoins across the network is now $252.72 billion, with USDT accounting for approximately 60.9% and USDC making up 24.1%.

data.title: Crypto Whale Stakes Significant Solana Holdings
data.description: According to PANews, Onchain Lens has reported that a major cryptocurrency investor staked 61,838 Solana (SOL) tokens approximately seven hours ago. The current market value of these tokens is estimated to be around $8.88 million.

data.title: WLFI consultant responds to shorting TRUMP: The two project entities are independent and hedge when necessary
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ogle (@cryptoogle), consultant of the Trump family's crypto project World Liberty Fi, posted on the X platform: "Why don't people know that Meme Coin and World Liberty Fi are completely different? In any case, hedging is indeed necessary in times of uncertainty." In addition, Ogle also confirmed that the Trump Group, WLFI, Trump Media Technology Group, and Meme Coin TRUMP are all independent. People speculate that they are related, but it does not change the fact that these entities are independent.
